untranslatable_reason: This is a regime/philosophy statement about accepting drawdowns to capture trends, not a position sizing rule. It describes WHEN to trade (entry conditions and regime filters) and WHY (trend frequency and opportunity cost), but contains no specific sizing mechanics, multipliers, or scaling instructions. The parameters provided (min_trend_confirmation_indicators, max_acceptable_drawdown_percent, etc.) are entry/regime filters, not position sizing directives.
